title: URF Spectral Gap Certification Standard
description: Schema for verifying URF_law3 compliance in operator systems and discrete graphs.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for the witness (e.g., EXT-1, EXT-2).

spectral_gap_value.description: The value of lambda_1 on the orthogonal complement of the Period Kernel.

period_kernel_certified.description: Must be true to confirm the gap is measured relative to ker(Per)^perp.

logic_width_dependency.description: Mapping for bounded treewidth instances where k >= f(tw).

external_witness_ref.description: Link to the external paper or physical benchmark.
